chapter_title.ar: باب فِيهِ نُتَفٌ وَ جَوَامِعُ مِنَ الرِّوَايَةِ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 109 – In it are pointers and the concise from the reports regarding the Wilayah

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ إِنَّ عَلِيّاً ( عليه السلام ) بَابٌ فَتَحَهُ اللَّهُ فَمَنْ دَخَلَهُ كَانَ مُؤْمِناً وَ مَنْ خَرَجَ مِنْهُ كَانَ كَافِراً وَ مَنْ لَمْ يَدْخُلْ فِيهِ وَ لَمْ يَخْرُجْ مِنْهُ كَانَ فِي الطَّبَقَةِ الَّذِينَ قَالَ اللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى لِي فِيهِمُ الْمَشِيئَةُ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Washha, from Abdullah Bin Sinan, from Abu Hamza who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> is a door which Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Opened. So the one who enters it would be a Momin, and the one who exits from it would be a disbeliever, and the one who does not enter it and does not exit from it would be in the layer (under a category about) which Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High has Said: ‘For Me<sup>azwj</sup>, regarding them, is the (pending) decision’.
